name: autopay_scheduled_15
description: Automatic utility payment notice containing a processing date

input.subject: Utility Autopay Scheduled
input.snippet: As part of your requested automatic payments, a payment has been scheduled.
input.body_text:
Dear Customer,

As part of your requested automatic payments, a payment for account ending 0007 has been scheduled as follows:

Date of Payment: 06/17/2026
Payment Amount: $84.21
Payment Method: Bank account ending 1234

No action is required. The payment will be processed automatically.

notes: Production regression: an automatic payment processing date is transactional, not a personal calendar event
